roles.name: Story Architect
roles.description: Designs the over-arching story spine — the Salesforce solution blueprint that all departments build to.

roles.name: Production Manager
roles.description: Holds the schedule, the call sheet, and the burn-down — answers to the Director.

roles.name: Pipeline Wrangler
roles.description: Steward of the production pipeline — fields, layouts, permission sets and shot tracking.

roles.name: Render Engineer
roles.description: Writes the Apex and LWC that bring the frames to life on the platform.

roles.name: Director of Photography
roles.description: Sets the look and the standard for all Salesforce craft on the lot.

roles.name: Senior Animator
roles.description: Hand-keys the most expressive shots — leads the junior animation pod through complex requirements.

roles.name: Junior Animator
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration through the shot under the Senior Animator's watch.

roles.name: VFX Supervisor
roles.description: Architect of the great effects spans — ties Salesforce to RenderMan, Houdini, and the realms beyond.

roles.name: FX Technical Director
roles.description: Sets the simulations — APIs, middleware, and event flows under the Supervisor's plan.

roles.name: FX Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of effects integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the careful art of error handling.

roles.name: Quality Inspector
roles.description: Tends the dailies and the screenings — finds the rendering errors before they reach the audience.

roles.name: Marketing Producer
roles.description: Lifts the trailer and the poster — leads all marketing craft for the picture.

roles.name: Trailer Editor
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — cuts the spots that bring the audience to the theater.

roles.name: Publicity Coordinator
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the press — content, creative, and the daily push.

roles.name: Story Artist
roles.description: Boards the sequences — translates between the Producer's wish and the engineering craft.

roles.name: Lead Render Engineer
roles.description: Owns the most demanding renders — the senior platform craft, mentor to the development pod.

roles.name: In-Betweener
roles.description: Fills the frames between the keys — entry-level platform work with senior oversight.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Toy Story — Andy's Room Inventory Platform

children.name: Toy Census in the Toy Box

realms.projectName: Monsters Inc — Scare Floor Energy CRM
Finding Nemo — Ocean Currents Logistics System

toy-story.name: Andy's Birthday Roll Call
toy-story.description: Discovery sign-off — every toy accounted for under the bed.

toy-story.name: Wings Unfolded
toy-story.description: Build kickoff: Buzz's spring-loaded wings deploy on cue.

toy-story.name: Pizza Planet Strategy Review
toy-story.description: Mid-project gate: solution review over the claw machine.

toy-story.name: Toys Rescued from Sid
toy-story.description: Phase invoice trigger: legacy toys safely migrated.

toy-story.name: Andy's Move to College
toy-story.description: Go-Live: the toy box ships to the new house.

toy-story.name: Hand-off to Bonnie
toy-story.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to the next kid.

monsters-inc.name: Scare Floor Open
monsters-inc.description: Project kickoff: the Scare Floor lights come on.

monsters-inc.name: First Door Activated
monsters-inc.description: Build phase: the first closet door spins up on the rail.

monsters-inc.name: 23-19 Drill Passes
monsters-inc.description: UAT gate: CDA decontamination protocols proven.

monsters-inc.name: Switch to Laugh Power
monsters-inc.description: Go-Live: comedy energy floods the grid.

monsters-inc.name: Boo's Door Reassembled
monsters-inc.description: Hyper-care close: every door restored to service.

monsters-inc.name: Final Energy Invoice
monsters-inc.description: Final invoice: city power contract reconciled.

finding-nemo.name: Drop-off Briefing
finding-nemo.description: Discovery: scope of the open ocean defined.

finding-nemo.name: Hop on the EAC
finding-nemo.description: Build: routing onto the East Australian Current.

finding-nemo.name: P. Sherman 42 Wallaby Way
finding-nemo.description: Solution review: address located, dentist confirmed.

finding-nemo.name: Tank Gang Liberation
finding-nemo.description: Go-Live: the tank gang escapes into Sydney Harbour.

finding-nemo.name: Reef Re-opened to the School
finding-nemo.description: Project close: Mr. Ray resumes the field trips.

finding-nemo.name: Final Reef Invoice
finding-nemo.description: Final invoice from the Reef Authority.

incredibles.name: Agent Dicker Briefing
incredibles.description: Kickoff at the NSA: identities and aliases briefed.

incredibles.name: Suits Fitted by Edna
incredibles.description: Discovery: each Super outfitted to spec — and no capes.

incredibles.name: Omnidroid Field Test
incredibles.description: Build: combat capabilities certified on Nomanisan.

incredibles.name: Family UAT in the Backyard
incredibles.description: UAT acceptance: powers integrated across the family.

incredibles.name: Underminer Surfaces
incredibles.description: Go-Live + handoff: the platform meets its first real threat.

incredibles.name: Final Hero Invoice
incredibles.description: Final invoice from the National Supers Agency.

Woody.notes: Cleaned and repaired at Al's Toy Barn — arm restitched.

Buzz Lightyear.notes: Recharging at Star Command between missions.

Jessie.notes: Yodeling festival — annual Woody's Roundup reunion.

Mr. Potato Head.notes: Lost his ear under the couch — recovery day.

Mike Wazowski.notes: Anniversary trip with Celia to the Harryhausen's reservation.

Dory.notes: Forgot she scheduled time off — taking it anyway.

Crush.notes: Riding the EAC — totally rad sabbatical, dude.

Bob Parr.notes: Bowling night — keeping up appearances at Insuricare.

Helen Parr.notes: PTA week — Dash's school principal meetings.

Lucius Best.notes: Honey said so. That's it. That's the reason.
